title: crotalaria beddomeana
intro: Crotalaria beddomeana, also known as Beddome's rattlepod, is a plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae) that is native to the Western Ghats in India. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Crotalaria beddomeana is traditionally prepared into herbal remedies, such as decoctions and infusions, which are used to treat various ailments, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
